description_long: This marble sculpture depicts two classical figures: a nude young man holding a spear and a helmeted woman in draped attire, likely representing a mythological or historical scene. The woman stands slightly behind and to the side of the man, her left hand resting on a large round shield adorned with a relief. The young man is in a dynamic pose, stepping forward with his right arm raised, gripping the spear, while his left arm is extended behind the woman. The woman's attire features intricate folds and a crested helmet, suggesting she is a warrior or goddess, possibly Athena. Both figures stand on a rectangular plinth with subtle weathering and discoloration at the base. The sculpture is rendered in a realistic style, with detailed anatomy and expressive gestures, evoking a sense of movement and narrative.
description: A detailed marble sculpture of a nude young man with a spear and a helmeted woman with a shield, both standing on a rectangular plinth in a dynamic, classical pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing both figures clearly: the young man steps forward with a raised spear, while the helmeted woman stands behind him, her shield visible at her side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the helmeted woman and the round shield, with the young man's extended arm and spear visible in the background.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the draped back of the woman's attire and the muscular back of the young man, with the shield and spear extending outward.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the dynamic interaction between the figures, with the spear projecting forward and the shield partially visible.
attribute_subject_matter: two classical human figures, one male and one female, in a mythological or historical scene
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
